subcodes.first_line: O leaf of the Divine Bounty! I am well aware of the trials, tribulations, adversities, and hardships that have befallen you in this mortal world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه رحمانیه بلایا ومحن و رزایاء و شدائد شما را مطلعم که در این دار فانی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
